nasb.text: It was when he came from Jerusalem to meet the king, that the king said to him, “Why did you not go with me, Mephibosheth?”

esv.text: And when he came to Jerusalem to meet the king, the king said to him, “Why did you not go with me, Mephibosheth?”

cnv.text: 他從耶路撒冷來迎接王的時候，王問他：“米非波設啊，你為甚麼沒有與我一同離開呢？”

ccb.text: 他到耶路撒冷来迎接王，王问他：“米非波设，当时你为什么不跟我一起走呢？”
